prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-GREYNYLONSPOONSET-4PC-BUN Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 4pc Grey Nylon Cooking Spoons Kitchen Utensils Set with Wooden Handle High Heat Resistance Description: Upgrade your kitchen with this versatile four piece nylon and wood cooking spoons kitchen utensils set from Beille, thoughtfully designed to handle all your cooking needs with ease and style. This set is perfect for everyday use, combining functionality and durability with a modern aesthetic. The collection includes a slotted spoon, a solid spoon, a ladle and lastly, a slotted skimmer spoon.

The kitchen utensils set have been designed with sturdy handles made of wood, so you can count on them to last. The ergonomic handle design with top rubber soft grip will provide comfort when in use and help prevent against slippage giving you maximum control when tackling your favorite recipes. The handles also come with built in slots for hanging storage if preferred.

Made from tough and durable nylon, these kitchen utensils can withstand high heat cooking temperatures, that will stand up to all the wear and tear your kitchen can dish out! The durable nylon construction ensures strength and flexibility when cooking in the kitchen.

Durable, easy to clean and safe for non stick cookware, these utensils are a must have for any culinary enthusiast. With the Beille nylon kitchen utensils set, you can cook, bake, serve and food prep in comfort and style for many meals to come! And, the modern design and neutral colors will go with just about any existing kitchen decor.

Dishwasher Safe. Search Terms: Kitchen utensils set; cooking baking supplies; meal food prep; kitchen starter set; serveware; house warming gifts new home; restaurant equipment; bakeware; kitchen gadgets tools; culinary gift ideas; skimmer spoon; cooking spoons Features: - 4PC COOKING SPOONS: Beille’s 4pc cooking spoons kitchen utensils set includes a solid spoon, slotted spoon, skimmer spoon and soup ladle, making it a great kitchen starter set for any kitchen - HEAT RESISTANT NYLON: Lightweight kitchen utensils are made of durable nylon which will not cause harmful chemical contamination of foods; kitchen utensils set has been designed to withstand high cooking temperatures while taking on your favorite recipes - ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Durable wood handles with soft rubber top makes for a comfortable grip when cooking; the top handle features a handy slot for easy hang storage if preferred; neutral grey color will style easily with any kitchen decor - DISHWASHER SAFE: Must have kitchen essentials items to add to your arsenal of kitchen utensils for cooking, baking, meal and food prep and more; conveniently dishwasher safe for quick clean up - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.60lbs; Color: Grey/Wood; Length: 13 inches approximately for each kitchen utensils, heights and widths vary by style === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4-pc Grey Nylon Cooking Spoons with Wooden Handle

tokens.name: Nylon Cooking Spoons with Wooden Handle

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Heat Resistant, Ergonomic Wood Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Non-Stick Cookware Safe, Includes Ladle And Skimmer

openai.title_differentiation: 4-Piece Kitchen Utensil Set, Heat Resistant Nylon, Wood Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Slotted Spoon, Ladle
